title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Livspace Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Livspace Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Livspace Capital India:
Livspace Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace Capital India!
